MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jane Akemi Yamamoto is present.
Attorney Michael Hall is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wendy Chang is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Nelsonya Causby.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of October 01, 2012 is vacated.
